scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('.next', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.rmSync('out', {recursive:true, force:true});"
scripts.build: npm run clean && next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('server.js')){fs.copyFileSync('server.js','.next/standalone/server.js');} if(fs.existsSync('public')){fs.cpSync('public','.next/standalone/public',{recursive:true});} if(fs.existsSync('.next/static')){fs.cpSync('.next/static','.next/standalone/.next/static',{recursive:true});} const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.next/standalone/package.json')); p.scripts={start:'node server.js'}; fs.writeFileSync('.next/standalone/package.json', JSON.stringify(p));"
